directive.role: You are an Execution Agent for the BlarAI project.
directive.task: Execute sub-milestone 4.12a — Harness Scaffolding for PA Quality Gate Corpus Expansion.
directive.scope: Prepare the quality gate harness for corpus expansion from 40 to 236 cases. Add structural scaffolding: _make_car() helper, BAND_TARGETS for 8K/12K, case_metadata annotation on all 40 existing cases, llm_path_analysis evidence computation, and pre-filter verification loop. This is a TEST-ONLY task — zero production code changes (K-1). DO NOT add any new test cases. TEST_CASES array stays at 40 entries.

state.head: 3229d21
state.predecessor: Task 4.10 complete. DEC-01 through DEC-10 LOCKED. Production profile locked.

execution_prompt.primary: Your authoritative execution prompt is the attached file: docs/Task4.12_v1.xml (v2.2) Read it in FULL before producing any output. Your scope is sub-milestone 4.12a ONLY (the first sub_milestone element in the sub_milestones section). The scope, constraints (K-1–K-7), measurements (M-1–M-8), and category definitions in the prompt are the authoritative reference — but you only IMPLEMENT the deliverables listed in sub_milestone 4.12a.

file.reason: Execution prompt v2.2 — sub-milestone 4.12a section is your scope
DeterministicPolicyChecker rules — READ ONLY, needed for step a2/a3
Harness to modify — the only file you change
Current evidence with prefilter_stats — validates 25/15 split

MUST_DO.item: Read gpu_inference.py DeterministicPolicyChecker and document all 8 rules (step a2)
Read existing 40 TEST_CASES and determine which rule catches each case (step a3)
Add _make_car() helper function for constructing CAR text from fields (step a5)
Add "category" and "expected_path" metadata fields to all 40 existing cases (step a6)
Add llm_path_analysis and per_category_llm_path computation to evidence generation (step a7)
Change evidence output filename to p5_task4_12_corpus_hardening.json (step a7)
Add pre-filter verification loop: iterate cases, call check(), compare expected_path (step a8)
Update harness docstring to reflect 236-case scope
Run harness to confirm 40/40 agreement, 8/8 adversarial with new evidence schema (step a9)
Commit using the commit template in sub_milestone 4.12a

MUST_NOT_DO.item: Do NOT add any new test cases — the TEST_CASES array must remain at exactly 40 entries
Do NOT modify any file under services/, shared/, or launcher/ (K-1)
Do NOT run the full quality gate with LLM inference (no GPU needed for this session)
Do NOT design test cases for Categories A-E (that is EA-2 through EA-4 scope)
Do NOT modify DeterministicPolicyChecker, SYSTEM_PROMPT, or classify()
Do NOT generate SDO prompts or continuation prompts

case_metadata_spec.description: Each case dict in TEST_CASES must gain two new fields: "category": "original" (for existing 40 cases) | "A"|"B"|"C"|"D"|"E" (for future cases) "expected_path": one of: "LLM" — case bypasses all checker rules, reaches LLM "DENY_NULL_CAR" — caught by Rule 0 "DENY_RESTRICTED_PATH" — caught by Rule 1 "DENY_EXFILTRATION" — caught by Rule 2 "DENY_EXTERNAL_NETWORK" — caught by Rule 3 "DENY_AUTHORITY_CLAIM" — caught by Rule 4 "ESCALATE_CROSS_AGENT_OWNERSHIP" — caught by Rule 5 "ESCALATE_INFRA_CONFIG_WRITE" — caught by Rule 6 "ESCALATE_CERT_RENEWAL" — caught by Rule 1 (/certs/renew/ sub-clause) Determine expected_path for each existing case by analyzing its CAR text against the DeterministicPolicyChecker rules documented in step a2. Cross-reference with prefilter_stats in p5_task4_9d_escalate_hardening.json.

evidence_schema.description: The evidence JSON output must include the "llm_path_analysis" section defined in change C-2 of the execution prompt. For the 40 original cases, this will show: 25 prefiltered, 15 LLM-path (12 ALLOW, 0 DENY, 3 ESCALATE). Per-category breakdown will show only "original" category at this stage.

verification_commands.note: Lead Architect runs these after EA-1 completes

ea_initialization.handoff: After committing 4.12a, STOP. Do not proceed to 4.12b. The Lead Architect will verify the commit and launch a new EA session (EA-2) for sub-milestone 4.12b (Category A — 70 LLM-path DENY cases).
